title: Allow tracing HTTP headers of all HTTP requests
body:
I spent one hour searching on a way of a verbose output of the http requests generated by skopeop.

The corporate WAF throws the "skopeo copy" at the last blob saying "Error determining upload URL: http: no Location header in response".

I was embarrassed as i was not able to provide a detailed response error to troubleshoot the issue.

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

There is a `--debug` option, that should be enough to identify the request.

As for a HTTP-level dump, there is https://github.com/containers/image/pull/201 but that’s not finished. (Of course external tools like Wireshark work, or don’t, just like they always do.)
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
